query: SELECT configKey, LEFT(configValue, 30) as value_preview, LENGTH(configValue) as len FROM platform_config WHERE configKey LIKE 'STRIPE%' ORDER BY configKey;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AafxdxuLDwTXdt.root --database Dw4mhfnuurFcniLsqjLpWN --execute SELECT configKey, LEFT(configValue, 30) as value_preview, LENGTH(configValue) as len FROM platform_config WHERE configKey LIKE 'STRIPE%' ORDER BY configKey;
